posts.author: trig
posts.body: Tapology Wagering League 2026 Welcome to Tapology's game for all you gambling addicts out there! The seasons run for 3 months. Part 1 runs January-March, Part 2 runs April-June, Part 3 runs July-Septemeber and Part 4 runs October-December. If you want in on the next one just let me know! The rules are linked below in red. If you have any questions just ask. Rules Tapology Wagering League Records Champions DIELEGEND23 2012 $95,730 POIR420 2012 $57,985 WOLFMANHOWL 2013 $131,985 FATALITY 2013 $465,150 2KTWEEK 2014 $550,195 TRAE BLACK 2014 $993,780 THEFREEMAN 2015 $438,065 THEFREEMAN 2015 $1,819,670 FACESTOMPER 2016 $405,488 2KTWEEK 2016 $303,750 DIELEGEND23 2017 $249,586 DIELEGEND23 2017 $191,440 RIPPLE 2018 $150,840 YASDAS 2018 $117,500 GATOR001 2019 $321,060 BESTSCP68 2019 $66,375 HYRM 2020 $58,000 SHAKEANDBAKE 2020 $732,080 BALAMUT 2021 $171,360 MIKEY1903 2021 $289,582 MIKEY1903 2022 $47,659 XCONCHRIS 2022 $177,277 MAXWRECKER 2022 $139,535 MAXWRECKER 2023 $97,670 Schwerindustrie 2023 $350,337 Kusycake 2023 $1,128,338 Schatte 2024 $324,485 Xconchris 2024 $116,029 Xconchris 2024 $342,553 Kushycake 2024 $292,774 Xconchris 2025 $1 Bellatrix 2025 $1,237,386 Xconchris 2025 $1Schwerindustrie 2025 $259,664 Records Straight TRAE BLACK $181,820 Underdog THEFREEMAN $275,820 Parlay HOUDINI199x $2,381,036 Prop SHAKEANDBAKE $360,035 Highest THEFREEMAN $1,822,170 Lowest XCONCHRIS $1

posts.author: Steve Terry
posts.body: STRAIGHTAll in ($9,832) Juliana Miller +500 (FanDuel)I know it's risky but Carli Judice has only ever won by KO/TKO and I just can't see Miller getting KO'd by her. I've got a sneaky feeling Miller will hold out and win a decision. * Edited at 02.18.2026, 3:53 PM ET *

posts.author: Bellatrix
posts.body: Damn, Stephen! All in on a lady dog! Best of luck to you!

posts.author: Steve Terry
posts.body: @Bellatrix Thanks, I'm gonna need it lol! It's a werid one because I don't think the bookies have got the odds wrong for the fight and Juliana Miller should be the underdog for the fight but it's just one of those I've got a sneaky feeling there will be an upset in. Carli Judice's main strengh is her abilty to knock people the **** out but I just can't see her knocking Miller out. Judice has also been unlucky with the judges, losing twice by split decision but I think the reason she didn't get those decisions is that her style dosen't always appear "judge friendly" so to speak and if Miller can take her the distance then I think she's far more likley to be given the decison than Judice. Lets not forget that Miller also has that previous experience in Invicta as well which is a criminally underrated promotion!

posts.author: CoolHandPuke
posts.body: @Steve Terry Miller's gunna get mauled.... What have you done?

posts.author: Steve Terry
posts.body: @CoolHandPuke Honestly, I just have a feeling that the only way Carli Judice wins is by KO and I just don't think she'll be able to stop Julianna Miller. Miller for me is very much a better fighter than her record suggests and if it goes the distance which I think it will, her style is going to score better with the judges. The risk is of course that damage is the main criteria but if Judice can't land any meaningful shots, which can't see happening, then she doesn't have a lot else to fall back on.As for this game, I'd always rather go out on my shield backing an underdog I had faith in than play a cautious game just for the sake of staying in it.

posts.author: Bellatrix
posts.body: I don't know, Terry is a perspicacious fellow. Judice is in my parlay. I'm nervous now.

posts.author: trig
posts.body: @grayerman Your question:okay did some shopping. still got: 10K Mike Malott ML + Jasmine Jasudavicius ML (-131). if I added the specific lines now I'd have Malott ML (-270) + Jasudavicius ML (-300) coming to -121 which is better odds than -131. Obviously willing to stick with -131 but its all up to you Once you place a wager it is final and the odds remain the same as when you placed the wager. Only problem is that you didn’t indicate what the ML for each leg was in your original post so when the Nascimento fight got cancelled I have no way of removing that leg of your parlayI think the best is to void all of your original wagers due to improper formatting and go with you new wagers that are formatted correctly10K Malott ML (-270) + Jasudavicius ML (-300) 7K Jamie Siraj ML (-256) 5K Jamie Siraj ML (-256) + Marcio Barbosa ML (-450) + Jasmine Jasudavicius ML (-300) + Mike Malott ML (-270) + Aldrich/Horth O2.5 (-550) 5K Robert Valentin inside the distance (-105) Hope this makes sense and good luck man
